RegistrationInfo.Description: Daily morning picks publish (11:05 AM Eastern)

Exec.Arguments: -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd 'c:\Users\jackp\Desktop\new_game'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path logs | Out-Null; $log = 'logs\morning_$((Get-Date).ToString(''yyyy-MM-dd'')).log'; (python fetch_today_odds.py 2>&1; python daily_picker.py --odds today_odds.csv 2>&1; cd picks_service; python aggregate_picks.py 2>&1; python discord_post.py 2>&1; python ig_image.py 2>&1; python ig_caption.py 2>&1) | Out-File -Encoding utf8 -FilePath ('../' + $log)"
